message:
fix: GitHub proxy rate limiter + deduplicate sidebar nav (#6899, #6900) (#6901)

* fix: add rate limiter to GitHub proxy to prevent PAT exhaustion (#6899)

Add a token-bucket rate limiter (golang.org/x/time/rate) that caps
outbound GitHub API calls to 30 req/min with a burst of 5. Returns
429 Too Many Requests when the limit is exceeded, protecting the
shared server-side PAT from being burned by runaway clients.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: remove duplicate Multi-Tenancy entry from sidebar navigation (#6900)

Multi-Tenancy appeared in both DEFAULT_PRIMARY_NAV (always visible)
and DISCOVERABLE_DASHBOARDS (hidden pool), causing potential
double-rendering when the dashboard filter promotes items. Remove the
duplicate from DISCOVERABLE_DASHBOARDS since it already has a
permanent slot in the primary nav.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,7 +80,6 @@ export const DISCOVERABLE_DASHBOARDS: SidebarItem[] = [
   { id: 'helm', name: 'Helm', icon: 'Package', href: '/helm', type: 'link', order: 8 },
   { id: 'llm-d-benchmarks', name: 'llm-d Benchmarks', icon: 'TrendingUp', href: '/llm-d-benchmarks', type: 'link', order: 9 },
   { id: 'logs', name: 'Logs', icon: 'FileText', href: '/logs', type: 'link', order: 10 },
-  { id: 'multi-tenancy', name: 'Multi-Tenancy', icon: 'Users', href: '/multi-tenancy', type: 'link', order: 10.5 },
   { id: 'network', name: 'Network', icon: 'Globe', href: '/network', type: 'link', order: 11 },
   { id: 'nodes', name: 'Nodes', icon: 'CircuitBoard', href: '/nodes', type: 'link', order: 12 },
   { id: 'operators', name: 'Operators', icon: 'Cog', href: '/operators', type: 'link', order: 13 },
